message:
feat(fwc): add metadata state representation vocabulary for CLI/JSON/log rendering

Add MetadataStateRepr table and helper functions (field_repr, format_field_cli,
format_field_log, field_state_json, format_provenance_field_cli/log) that give
every MetadataField state (Known/Unknown/Unsupported/Unavailable/NotApplicable)
a canonical CLI symbol, label, color, explanation, actionability flag, and
follow-up guidance.

This ensures downstream consumers (MCP export, workflow engine, discovery UI,
TOON renderer) speak the same vocabulary without inventing custom variants.

40 new tests covering table coverage, symbol uniqueness, JSON stability,
CLI/log formatting, provenance formatting, and cross-cutting invariants.

Bead: 1g7z0.29.6.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
